api.unknownEndpoint: Unknown server endpoint ({{path}}). Restart the backend to load the new routes.

progressPanel.interruptHint: Stop will happen after the current item.
progressPanel.leaveHint: You can leave this page: the generation keeps running in the background and will pick up where it left off when you return.

ribbon.exportTitle: Export the full project as a .bdgen archive
ribbon.duplicateTitle: Duplicate this project (choose what to carry over)

onboarding.neverShowAgain: Don't show this guide on launch

initial.title: Before you create your first comic
initial.intro: BdGEN uses your own API keys to generate text and images. This short intro covers the basics before setup.
initial.step1Body: The master password encrypts your keys on this computer. BdGEN does not store it: you'll need to remember it to reopen the vault.
initial.step2Body: OpenAI is required to start. Anthropic, xAI, and Replicate are optional depending on the models you want to use.
initial.step3Body: A comic consumes text and image calls. Cost varies by model, number of pages, retries, and upscale; start with a small test project and watch the cost stats inside BdGEN.
initial.step3BodyWithUpscale: A comic consumes text and image calls. Cost varies by model, number of pages, retries, and upscale; start with a small test project and watch the cost stats inside BdGEN.

app.title: How a creation unfolds
app.intro: The tool advances step by step. You can go back, restart a part, and stay in control before costly generations.
app.step1Body: Describe the story, the format, the characters, and the style. The clearer the foundation, the more consistent the next steps will be.
app.step2Body: The Writing step turns your brief into a structured script. You can correct the result before launching the images.
app.step3Body: BdGEN creates the visual sheets for characters, locations, and objects. Validate or refine them before the final pages.
app.step4Body: Pages, cover, and PDF are generated from the script and the references. Upscale remains optional to improve definition.
app.step4BodyNoUpscale: Pages, cover, and PDF are generated from the script and the references.

home.title: Welcome to BdGEN
home.intro: BdGEN writes the script, draws the references, then assembles a full comic from a simple description. Start a new project, pick up an existing one, or import a .bdgen archive to pick up where you left off.
home.duplicateTitle: Duplicate this project (choose what to carry over)
home.deleteConfirmBody: “{{name}}” will be permanently deleted, along with its script, references, and pages. This action is irreversible.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.introQuick: Start from a simple idea: we'll create the project and pre-fill the form for you.
newProject.introForm: Review and adjust the information below. You can refine it at any time from the “Preparation” step.

secrets.passwordTooShort: Choose a master password of at least 8 characters.
secrets.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
secrets.unlockBody: Enter the master password to decrypt the local API keys.
secrets.setupBody: API keys will be encrypted on disk. The master password will not be stored.
secrets.pageBody: Full values are never shown. Replace a key by entering a new value.

projectStats.title: Statistics
projectStats.recentEmpty: No instrumented generation for this project yet.

confirmDelete.cascadeBody_one: {{count}} page (starting from page {{from}}) will be removed and rewritten to preserve story consistency.
confirmDelete.cascadeBody_other: {{count}} pages (starting from page {{from}}) will be removed and rewritten to preserve story consistency.
confirmDelete.cascadeFootnote: The cover and back cover stay unchanged — you can retouch them separately.
confirmDelete.noImpact: ✓ This item is not mentioned in any existing page. The deletion will not affect the script.

duplicate.title: Duplicate this project
duplicate.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores only.
duplicate.alwaysNote: The script, pages, PDF, and feedback are never copied: the copy restarts at the “Preparation” step.
duplicate.photosDesc: Reference photos uploaded by the user for characters, locations, and objects.
duplicate.styleRefDesc: Image associated with the graphic style (if it exists).
duplicate.aiRefsDesc: Keep the references already generated (useful for a Volume 2 — no need to regenerate them).

import.title: Import a project
import.body: You can customize the title and identifier of the imported project. Leave the fields empty to use the original values from the archive.
import.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores only.

inpaint.drawFirst: Draw the area to touch up first.
inpaint.describeFirst: Describe what you want to change.
inpaint.title: Inpainting — {{label}}
inpaint.instruction: Paint the area to modify, then describe the desired retouch.
inpaint.promptLabel: What would you like to change in this area?
inpaint.promptPlaceholder: e.g. replace the background with a starry sky, change the coat color to red…

styleFromImage.title: Get inspired by an image
styleFromImage.body: Upload an image (JPEG, PNG, WEBP). A vision model extracts the visual style and, if characters are visible, their descriptions — to pre-fill the form.
styleFromImage.caveat: No reference to protected authors, studios, or characters will be produced — only generic descriptors.
styleFromImage.dropzone: Click or drop an image here
styleFromImage.preResult: Once you've chosen an image, start the analysis. You'll be able to review the description before applying it to the form.
styleFromImage.selectHint: Check the ones to add to the project.
styleFromImage.noCharactersOrLocations: No character or location identified — only the style fields will be applied.

referencesBundle.exportTitle: Export a selection of characters / locations / objects (with their images) into a .bdrefs file
referencesBundle.importTitle: Import a .bdrefs file to reuse a casting from another project
referencesBundle.title: Export references
referencesBundle.intro: Select the items to include in the .bdrefs file. Only entries whose reference image exists on disk are listed.
referencesBundle.empty: No reference available (missing PNG or undefined item).

form.priceFastSuffix: · standard mode (cheapest); “fast” mode doubles this rate
form.priceUnknown: No estimated rate for this model

identity.title: Project identity
identity.nameHint: Optional — only used to find the project in the list. Never appears in the generated comic. If empty, the comic title is shown.
identity.slugHint: Optional — derived from the project name or the title if empty. Letters, digits, and underscores.
identity.comicTitleHint: Appears on the cover and in the generated content.

story.title: Story
story.synopsisHint: Present the story in a few sentences.

casting.title: Casting
casting.intro: Characters, locations, and objects — descriptions, optional photos, and reference images. Import or export a subset as .bdrefs to reuse it in another comic (e.g. Volume 2).
casting.aiAllowCharacters: Let the AI invent extra characters if the story needs them
casting.aiSuggestsCharacters: The AI will suggest them based on the story's needs.
casting.aiAllowLocations: Let the AI invent extra locations if the story needs them
casting.aiSuggestsLocations: The AI will invent them based on the story's needs.
casting.noLocationsWarning: ⚠️ No location available — the AI won't be able to place scenes.
casting.descriptionHint: Describe the place: visual elements, atmosphere, era…
casting.objectsIntro: Optional. Add a book, a product, a symbolic object that should reappear in the story. An optional photo will serve as a guide to draw a cartoonish version of it in the comic's style.
casting.aiAllowObjects: Let the AI invent extra objects if the story needs them
casting.aiMarginObjects: The AI will invent them only marginally.
casting.objectDescriptionHint: Describe the object and its role in the story.

structure.title: Structure
structure.pageFormatHint: Determines the page ratio and the template enforced for the image model.
structure.pageFormatStrip: Strip — horizontal band, panels in one row
structure.narrativePacePlaceholder: e.g. slow at the start, accelerating toward the final reveal

models.title: Generation models
models.scriptEffortHint: Speed/depth variant for compatible Claude models.
models.referencesUseDedicatedLabel: Use a dedicated model for references
models.upscaleModeHint: Choose a target in megapixels or a multiplicative factor.
models.upscaleTargetHint: Used in "target size" mode. Example: 4 MP.
models.upscaleFactorHint: Used in "factor" mode. Example: 2 = width and height ×2.
models.upscaleQualityHint: Applied to JPEG and WebP formats. Ignored for PNG.
models.upscaleFootnote: Uses the Pruna P-Image-Upscale model via the Replicate API. Cost: ~$0.005/image (1-4 MP) or ~$0.01/image (5-8 MP). Requires REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the server's .env.

form.styleConfirm:
The style will replace the project's. The script (text, dialogue, characters, pages) stays intact, but the reference images and composed pages will be removed so they can be regenerated with the new style.

Continue?
form.applyStyleTitle: Update the style and reset images without touching the script.
form.characterPhotoHint: The first photo is analyzed to pre-fill the sheet and serves as a resemblance guide (caricature effect). Additional photos enrich the visual anchor. The defined style remains the priority.
form.locationPhotoHint: The first photo is analyzed to pre-fill name and description. All photos serve as a guide to draw the location in the comic's style. No character will be carried over.
form.objectPhotoHint: The first photo is analyzed to pre-fill the sheet. All photos serve as a guide to produce a stylized version of the object in the comic's style.
form.maxPhotosWarning: Maximum {{max}} photo(s) — additional photos would not be passed to the model.
form.artStyleDisabledHint: Disabled: the style reference image on the right already locks this parameter.
form.artStyleFromImage: Defined by the style reference image.
form.expandHint: With a style reference image, only the precise descriptive fields (palette, inking, frames, bubbles, character rendering) stay active. They complement the image, they don't replace it.
form.panelBordersPlaceholder: e.g. thick, slightly irregular black border
form.speechBubblesPlaceholder: e.g. white bubbles, thin round outline
form.characterRenderingPlaceholder: e.g. round faces, dot eyes, few shadows
form.antiPlagiarismLabel: Lift the anti-plagiarism protection (copy a known style)
form.antiPlagiarismDesc: Disables the strict non-copy rule applied to the style reference image. The AI will then be able to faithfully imitate the visual identity of the reference (characters, costumes, motifs) to reproduce a known style. Only has effect if a style reference image is provided.
form.legalBody: The generated content may reproduce protected elements (characters, works, brands) and raise a legal issue. It is your sole responsibility to ensure you have the rights needed to use and distribute this content.

inpaint.drawFirst: Draw the area to touch up first.
inpaint.describeFirst: Describe what you want to change.

imageStep.stale: Text has changed since this image

commands.startTitle: Start the generation with the quality set in preparation.
commands.regenAllTitle: Regenerate all images of this step.
commands.staleTitle_one: {{count}} image no longer matches the modified text.
commands.staleTitle_other: {{count}} images no longer match the modified text.
commands.inpaintDisabledTitle: First restore this version to touch it up.
commands.inpaintDefaultTitle: Paint an area and describe the retouch.
commands.refineTitle: Describe a retouch in natural language.

imageStep.progressHint: You can browse the images already generated. To give feedback, stop the generation first.
imageStep.progressHintUpscale: You can browse the images already generated during the local upscale.
imageStep.refineDialogHint: Describe what should change. The generation will be relaunched for this item only (others stay intact).
imageStep.regenAllConfirmBody_one: The {{count}} image of this step will be regenerated. Existing images will be replaced. This consumes API credits.
imageStep.regenAllConfirmBody_other: The {{count}} images of this step will be regenerated. Existing images will be replaced. This consumes API credits.
imageStep.regenOneConfirmBody: The current image will be replaced by a new generation. This consumes API credits.
imageStep.inpaintBody: Paint the area on the image, then describe the change.
imageStep.inpaintPlaceholder: e.g. replace the background with a starry sky, change the coat color to red…
imageStep.textChangedChipTitle: The text was modified after this image.

quickCreate.placeholder:
Describe what you want, from the vaguest to the most precise. For example:

• “Surprise me with a sci-fi story”
• “The founding of a tech company by two friends in a garage, in manga”
• “Turn my attached biology course material into a teaching comic”
quickCreate.stageCasting: Creating the casting and visual style…
quickCreate.title: Quick create
quickCreate.body: Describe your idea in a sentence or a paragraph, and/or add reference documents (course, notes…). We pre-fill the form (story, style, structure, and casting); you can review and adjust everything afterwards.
quickCreate.styleAiOption: Let the AI choose based on the story
quickCreate.styleHint: You'll be able to refine it in detail in the form.

ribbon.regenAllTitle: Rewrites the whole script from scratch.

scriptBrowser.feedbackImprove: Improve this page by taking into account these coherence remarks: {{messages}}
scriptBrowser.feedbackRegen: Regenerate this page to reinforce the script coherence.
scriptBrowser.partialScript: Partial script ({{written}}/{{target}} pages). You can resume the generation.
scriptBrowser.regenAllConfirmBody: The whole script (characters, locations, objects, covers, and all pages) will be removed and rewritten from scratch by the LLM. Existing images (references, composed pages) will be flagged as stale. This action is long and consumes API credits.
scriptBrowser.emptyBody: The LLM will expand the synopsis into a full script: characters, locations, cover, back cover, then each page one by one. You can review and touch up each element when it's done.
scriptBrowser.progressHint: You can review what's already been written below. Touch-ups come back as soon as the generation ends.

characters.refineHint: Describe the change to make to the character. The LLM will only update this character.
characters.regenBody: The description of this character will be rewritten by the LLM. This action consumes API credits.
characters.deleteBody: This character and all its appearances will be removed from the script.

locations.refineHint: Describe the change to make to the location. The LLM will only update this location.
locations.regenBody: The description of this location will be rewritten by the LLM. This action consumes API credits.
locations.deleteBody: This location and all the scenes that take place there will be removed from the script.

objects.empty: No object / product / reference for this project.
objects.refineHint: Describe the change to make to the object. The LLM will only update this object.
objects.regenBody: The description of this object will be rewritten by the LLM. This action consumes API credits.
objects.deleteBody: This object and all the panels that refer to it will be removed from the script.

pages.refineHint: Describe the change to make to this page. The LLM will only rewrite this page.
pages.refineCascadeLabel: Also regenerate the following pages for coherence (recommended for important changes).
pages.regenBody: The script of this page will be rewritten by the LLM with new ideas. This action consumes API credits.

covers.subtitle: Subtitle:
covers.refineCoverHint: Describe the change to make to the cover (illustration, title placement, tagline…).
covers.refineBackCoverHint: Describe the change to make (synopsis, tagline, layout…).
covers.regenCoverBody: The cover description will be rewritten by the LLM. This action consumes API credits.
covers.regenBackCoverBody: The synopsis and the layout of the back cover will be rewritten by the LLM. This action consumes API credits.

coherence.statusCheckedClean: Last verification ran without errors or suggestions.
coherence.statusUnchecked: No verification was run since the last changes.
coherence.emptyChecked: No error or suggestion detected during the last verification.
coherence.emptyUnchecked: Run a verification to analyze the script coherence.
coherence.applyBody: The LLM will analyze the script and apply this change. Depending on the nature of the change, pages, characters, or locations may be updated. This action consumes API credits.

addItem.name: Name
addItem.referencePromptPlaceholder: If empty, it will be derived from the description.
addItem.idNameDescriptionRequired: The id, name and description are required.

dataFlow.title: Show inferred data-flow edges (setup → page, page → compose_page, …). Select a node to isolate its lineage.
dataFlow.label: Data flow

nodeDrawer.empty: Select a node in the graph to see its details.
nodeDrawer.archiveMissing: archive not found — showing the current version
nodeDrawer.diffPrompt: prompt — A (top) vs B (bottom) by line

panel.empty: No trace yet. Run a generation with BDGEN_DEBUG=1.
panel.diffActive: diff active — modified nodes have a purple border

versionPicker.label: Version
versionPicker.restoreTitle: Restore this version as the current version

preparation.syncBody: The configuration has changed since the script was last written. The model can incorporate these changes without rewriting the story or modifying existing dialogue.
preparation.removedBody: Check the ones to also remove from the script. The pages that used them will be removed and regenerated to preserve consistency. Unchecked items stay in the script.
preparation.removedImpact: {{count}} page(s) removed and regenerated (starting from page {{from}}).
preparation.removedNoImpact: Not used in any page — removal has no impact.
preparation.noConfig: No saved configuration for this project.

references.title: Visual references
references.intro: A model page is generated for each character and each location. They serve as a permanent reference to keep the characters consistent from one page to another.
references.emptyLabel: This reference has not been generated yet.

compose.downloadPdfTitle: All pages assembled in a PDF album.
compose.title: Final pages
compose.intro: Generation of each page in full page with bubbles, text, colors, and finishes. The longest and most API-expensive step — the quality used is the one defined in the preparation phase.

upscale.title: Upscale (Pruna)
upscale.notEnabled: Upscale is not enabled for this project. Enable it in the Preparation section (Generation models → Local CPU upscale) to enlarge the pages via the local Pruna model.
upscale.missingReplicate: Upscale is enabled but the Replicate API key is not configured on the server. Add REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the server's .env file.
upscale.noPages: No composed page is available. First generate the pages in the previous step before launching the upscale.
upscale.intro: Enlargement of the pages via Pruna P-Image-Upscale (Replicate). Cost: ~$0.005/image (1-4 MP) or ~$0.01/image (5-8 MP).
